The '''Sith Academy''' of [[Umbara/Legends|Umbara]] was established by the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] near the end of the [[New Sith Wars]]. One of several academies established for [[Sith training]] during the era, the Umbaran academy was utilized for training [[Sith assassin/Legends|Sith assassins]] and [[Sith spy|spies]]. Taught the ways of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], and schooled in secrecy and deception, students of the Umbaran academy preferred to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Death/Legends|kill]], and became some of the deadliest [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. [[Standard century/Legends|Centuries]] later, the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] and his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprenticed]] brother, [[Savage Opress/Legends|Savage Opress]], journeyed to the academy on Umbara.

==History==
[[File:MaulUmbaraSithAcademy-CWA.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Darth Maul at the academy]]
The [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] used it to [[Sith training|train]] [[Sith assassin/Legends|Sith assassins]] and [[Sith spy|spies]], including [[Umbaran Shadow Assassin|Umbaran shadow spies]]. These initiates had a greater aptitude in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] than their brethren in the [[Sith academy|academies]] on [[Sith Academy (Honoghr)|Honoghr]], [[Sith Academy (Gentes)|Gentes]], and [[Sith Academy (Gamorr)|Gamorr]]. Here, recruits learned to use the dark side for secrecy, deception, and manipulation. Those who survived the rigorous training became deadly assassins, preferring use of the dark side to kill rather than with physical force.<ref name="DBPOD" />

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], various Sith reunited at the academy ruins, including [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] and his brother, [[Savage Opress/Legends|Savage Opress]], and [[Varad Zagg]]. At this point, an [[Unidentified Jedi Knight (Clone Wars)|unidentified Jedi Knight]] infiltrated it after finding pieces of a [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]], required to open the door to the academy, and defeating various [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolytes]] near the entrance. Once inside, the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] fought four [[Training droid (Umbaran Sith Academy)|training droids]], before moving on to Varad, who created illusions of [[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]].
